metric_definitions.tracking_iae: integral absolute error for temperatures and controlled levels
metric_definitions.tracking_ise: integral squared error for temperatures and controlled levels
metric_definitions.tracking_overshoot: largest positive excursion above the active setpoint
metric_definitions.tracking_settling_time: last time at which any tracked variable exceeded tolerance
metric_definitions.energy_kwh: total heat plus pump energy over the rollout
metric_definitions.constraint_violation_count: number of steps with any process constraint violation
metric_definitions.constraint_violation_severity: sum of positive per-constraint violation magnitudes

model.name: Exothermic CSTR
model.summary: Two-state exothermic reactor with feed dilution and cooling-jacket action.

metric_definitions.tracking_iae: integral absolute error for temperatures and controlled levels
metric_definitions.tracking_ise: integral squared error for temperatures and controlled levels
metric_definitions.tracking_overshoot: largest positive excursion above the active setpoint
metric_definitions.tracking_settling_time: last time at which any tracked variable exceeded tolerance
metric_definitions.energy_kwh: total heat plus pump energy over the rollout
metric_definitions.constraint_violation_count: number of steps with any process constraint violation
metric_definitions.constraint_violation_severity: sum of positive per-constraint violation magnitudes

rollout.setpoint: active setpoint context exposed to the controller
rollout.disturbance: disturbance values applied by the process model
rollout.reward: training reward returned by the environment
rollout.profit: raw economic profit for the step
rollout.constraint: normalized process constraint penalty for the step

episode_metrics.return: sum of environment reward over the rollout; reward is the training signal
episode_metrics.profit: sum of raw economic profit reported by the environment
episode_metrics.normalized_score: 0-100 KPI score from KPIScorer; score is for reporting, not raw economics
episode_metrics.production: sum of process production reported by the environment
episode_metrics.energy_kwh: total heat plus pump energy over the rollout
episode_metrics.tracking_iae: integral absolute error for temperatures and controlled levels
episode_metrics.tracking_ise: integral squared error for temperatures and controlled levels
episode_metrics.tracking_overshoot: largest positive excursion above the active setpoint
episode_metrics.tracking_settling_time: last time at which any tracked variable exceeded tolerance
episode_metrics.constraint: sum of normalized soft constraint penalty reported by the environment
episode_metrics.constraint_violation_count: number of steps with any process constraint violation
episode_metrics.constraint_violation_duration: seconds spent with any process constraint violation
episode_metrics.constraint_violation_severity: sum of positive per-constraint violation magnitudes
episode_metrics.action_violation_count: number of controller outputs outside action bounds before env clipping
episode_metrics.action_violation_severity: sum of action-bound excess before env clipping
episode_metrics.runaway_count: number of runaway steps reported by the environment
episode_metrics.safety_margin_min: minimum negative violation margin; 0 means no violation was observed
